arabic: إِنَّمَا الْأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّاتِ، وَإِنَّمَا لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مَا نَوَى
pronunciation: Innamal-a'malu bin-niyyat, wa innama likulli-mri'in ma nawa
translation: Actions are judged by intentions, and every person will get the reward according to what he has intended.

arabic: تَبَسُّمُكَ فِي وَجْهِ أَخِيكَ لَكَ صَدَقَةٌ
pronunciation: Tabassumuka fee wajhi akheeka laka sadaqah
translation: Your smiling at your brother is charity for you.

arabic: مَنْ سَلَكَ طَرِيقًا يَلْتَمِسُ فِيهِ عِلْمًا سَهَّلَ اللَّهُ لَهُ بِهِ طَرِيقًا إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ
pronunciation: Man salaka tareeqan yaltamisu feehi 'ilman, sahhalallahu lahu bihi tareeqan ilal-jannah
translation: Whoever follows a path in pursuit of knowledge, Allah will make easy for him a path to Paradise.

arabic: الْمُسْلِمُ مَنْ سَلِمَ الْمُسْلِمُونَ مِنْ لِسَانِهِ وَيَدِهِ
pronunciation: Al-muslimu man salimal-muslimoona min lisanihi wa yadihi
translation: The Muslim is one from whose tongue and hand the Muslims are safe.
